title: Linux Web Shell File Creation
description: Detects file creation or modification in common web directories that may indicate web shell deployment for persistent remote access.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*/var/www/html/*' or msg like '*/var/www/cgi-bin/*' or msg like '*/usr/share/nginx/html/*' or msg like '*/opt/lampp/htdocs/*' or msg like '*/srv/http/*')) and ((msg like '*.php*' or msg like '*.jsp*' or msg like '*.aspx*' or msg like '*.sh*')))
